---
title: "RIP-seq: eIF4E enrichment and Teleman comparison"
author: "Kate"
date: "2026-05"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggvenn)
library(cowplot)
```

```{r thresholds}
LFC_CUTOFF  <- 1
PADJ_CUTOFF <- 0.05
TELEMAN_LFC_CUTOFF <- 1.0
```

# eIF4E volcano plots

```{r load_4e_results}
deseq_results_4e <- readRDS(here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_4e_results_list.rds"))
cat("Timepoints in 4e results list:", paste(names(deseq_results_4e), collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

```{r enriched_counts_4e}
enriched_per_tp_4e <- lapply(deseq_results_4e, function(res) {
  res |> filter(padj < PADJ_CUTOFF, log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF) |> pull(gene_id)
})

cat("eIF4E-enriched genes (padj <", PADJ_CUTOFF, ", log2FC >", LFC_CUTOFF, "):\n")
for (tp in names(enriched_per_tp_4e)) {
  cat(" ", tp, ":", length(enriched_per_tp_4e[[tp]]), "\n")
}
```

```{r volcano_4e, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
make_volcano_4e <- function(res_df, tp_name) {
  plot_df <- res_df |>
    filter(!is.na(padj)) |>
    mutate(
      sig = case_when(
        padj < PADJ_CUTOFF & log2FoldChange >  LFC_CUTOFF ~ "enriched",
        padj < PADJ_CUTOFF & log2FoldChange < -LFC_CUTOFF ~ "depleted",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    )

  top_labels <- plot_df |>
    filter(sig == "enriched") |>
    slice_min(padj, n = 15)

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj), color = sig)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.8) +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_labels, aes(label = symbol),
                    size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 20, color = "black") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(enriched = "#E69F00", depleted = "steelblue", ns = "grey70")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-LFC_CUTOFF, LFC_CUTOFF), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(PADJ_CUTOFF), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
             label = paste0("enriched: ", sum(plot_df$sig == "enriched")), size = 3) +
    labs(title = tp_name,
         x = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)",
         y = "-log10(padj)",
         color = NULL) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
}

volcano_plots_4e <- lapply(names(deseq_results_4e), function(tp) {
  make_volcano_4e(deseq_results_4e[[tp]], tp)
})

plot_grid(plotlist = volcano_plots_4e, ncol = 2, labels = "AUTO")
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "03_ripseq_volcano_eif4e.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
```

# Density plots: eIF4E LFC across timepoints

```{r density_4e_timepoints, fig.width=12, fig.height=3}
tp_levels <- c("normoxia_1hr", "hypoxia_1hr", "hypoxia_4hr", "hypoxia_24hr")

p_density_4e <- bind_rows(deseq_results_4e) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#56B4E9", fill = "#56B4E9", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, nrow = 1) +
  xlim(-1, 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)", y = "Density") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_density_4e
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "03_density_eif4e_timepoints.pdf"), p_density_4e,
       width = 12, height = 3)
```

```{r density_4e_timepoints_v2, fig.width=12, fig.height=3}
enriched_counts_df <- bind_rows(deseq_results_4e) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange), !is.na(padj)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  group_by(timepoint) |>
  summarise(n_enriched = sum(log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF & padj < PADJ_CUTOFF),
            .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(label = paste0("n = ", n_enriched))

p_density_4e_v2 <- bind_rows(deseq_results_4e) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = tp_levels)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, color = "#56B4E9", fill = "#56B4E9", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_text(data = enriched_counts_df, aes(label = label),
            x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)", y = "Density") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_density_4e_v2
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "03_density_eif4e_timepoints_v2.pdf"), p_density_4e_v2,
       width = 12, height = 3)
```

# CDF: normoxia eIF4E-IP vs Teleman vehicle eIF4E-IP

```{r load_teleman_vehicle}
teleman_vehicle <- read_csv(
  "/Users/katematlin/github/mpra_preliminary/res_eif4e_ip_vehicle.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) |>
  group_by(symbol) |>
  slice_max(order_by = baseMean, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(teleman_enriched = log2FoldChange > TELEMAN_LFC_CUTOFF & padj < PADJ_CUTOFF)

cat("Teleman vehicle genes loaded:", nrow(teleman_vehicle), "\n")
cat("Teleman-enriched (LFC >", TELEMAN_LFC_CUTOFF, ", padj <", PADJ_CUTOFF, "):",
    sum(teleman_vehicle$teleman_enriched, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r load_normoxia_4e}
norm_4e <- read_csv(
  here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_normoxia_1hr_eif4e_vs_igg.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange))

cat("Normoxia 1hr eIF4E genes (non-NA LFC):", nrow(norm_4e), "\n")
```

```{r cdf_teleman_join}
cdf_df <- norm_4e |>
  left_join(dplyr::select(teleman_vehicle, symbol, teleman_enriched),
            by = "symbol") |>
  mutate(teleman_enriched = replace_na(teleman_enriched, FALSE))

stopifnot("Too few Teleman-enriched genes after join — check file path or symbol matching" =
  sum(cdf_df$teleman_enriched) > 50)

cat("Genes in CDF:", nrow(cdf_df), "\n")
cat("Teleman-enriched after join:", sum(cdf_df$teleman_enriched), "\n")
cat("All other:", sum(!cdf_df$teleman_enriched), "\n")
```

```{r density_4e_vs_teleman, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
dens_compare <- bind_rows(
  norm_4e |>
    mutate(source = "Our normoxia eIF4E-IP") |>
    dplyr::select(symbol, log2FoldChange, source),
  teleman_vehicle |>
    mutate(source = "Teleman vehicle eIF4E-IP") |>
    dplyr::select(symbol, log2FoldChange, source)
) |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange))

p_dens_compare <- ggplot(dens_compare, aes(x = log2FoldChange, color = source, fill = source)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.15) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Our normoxia eIF4E-IP"    = "#56B4E9",
    "Teleman vehicle eIF4E-IP" = "#E69F00"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Our normoxia eIF4E-IP"    = "#56B4E9",
    "Teleman vehicle eIF4E-IP" = "#E69F00"
  )) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (eIF4E IP / IgG)", y = "Density", color = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.7, 0.85))

p_dens_compare
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "03_density_4e_vs_teleman.pdf"), p_dens_compare,
       width = 6, height = 5)
```

```{r cdf_plot, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
wt <- wilcox.test(log2FoldChange ~ teleman_enriched, data = cdf_df,
                  alternative = "less")
wilcox_label <- paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(wt$p.value, 2))

group_labels <- c(
  "TRUE"  = paste0("Teleman-enriched (n = ", sum(cdf_df$teleman_enriched), ")"),
  "FALSE" = paste0("All other genes (n = ", sum(!cdf_df$teleman_enriched), ")")
)

p_cdf <- ggplot(cdf_df,
                aes(x = log2FoldChange,
                    color = factor(teleman_enriched),
                    group = factor(teleman_enriched))) +
  stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#E69F00", "FALSE" = "grey40"),
    labels = group_labels
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
           label = wilcox_label, size = 3) +
  labs(
    x     = "eIF4E IP / IgG log2FC (normoxia, 1hr)",
    y     = "Cumulative fraction",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.3, 0.85))

p_cdf
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "03_normoxia_4e_vs_teleman_vehicle_cdf.pdf"),
       p_cdf, width = 6, height = 5)
```

# Venn diagram: normoxia eIF4E-IP vs Teleman vehicle enriched genes

```{r venn_4e_teleman}
our_enriched    <- norm_4e |>
  filter(log2FoldChange > LFC_CUTOFF, padj < PADJ_CUTOFF) |>
  pull(symbol)

teleman_enriched_genes <- teleman_vehicle |>
  filter(teleman_enriched) |>
  pull(symbol)

cat("Our normoxia eIF4E-enriched (LFC >", LFC_CUTOFF, ", padj <", PADJ_CUTOFF, "):",
    length(our_enriched), "\n")
cat("Teleman vehicle-enriched (LFC >", TELEMAN_LFC_CUTOFF, ", padj <", PADJ_CUTOFF, "):",
    length(teleman_enriched_genes), "\n")
cat("Overlap:", length(intersect(our_enriched, teleman_enriched_genes)), "\n")

venn_list <- list(
  "Normoxia eIF4E-IP\nenriched" = our_enriched,
  "Teleman vehicle\neIF4E-IP enriched" = teleman_enriched_genes
)

p_venn <- ggvenn(venn_list,
                 fill_color  = c("#E69F00", "grey50"),
                 stroke_size = 0.5,
                 text_size   = 3.5) +
  theme_void()

p_venn
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "03_normoxia_4e_vs_teleman_venn.pdf"),
       p_venn, width = 5, height = 5)
```

```{r cdf_our_in_teleman, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
our_enriched_strict <- norm_4e |>
  filter(log2FoldChange > 2, padj < PADJ_CUTOFF) |>
  pull(symbol)

teleman_cdf_df <- teleman_vehicle |>
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
  mutate(our_rip_enriched = symbol %in% our_enriched_strict)

cat("Teleman genes (non-NA LFC):", nrow(teleman_cdf_df), "\n")
cat("Our normoxia eIF4E-RIP enriched (LFC > 2) in Teleman:",
    sum(teleman_cdf_df$our_rip_enriched), "\n")

wt2 <- wilcox.test(log2FoldChange ~ our_rip_enriched, data = teleman_cdf_df,
                   alternative = "less")
wilcox_label2 <- paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(wt2$p.value, 2))

n_enriched <- sum(teleman_cdf_df$our_rip_enriched)
n_other    <- sum(!teleman_cdf_df$our_rip_enriched)

group_labels2 <- c(
  "TRUE"  = paste0("eIF4E-RIP enriched, LFC > 2 (n = ", n_enriched, ")"),
  "FALSE" = paste0("All other genes (n = ", n_other, ")")
)

p_cdf2 <- ggplot(teleman_cdf_df,
                 aes(x = log2FoldChange,
                     color = factor(our_rip_enriched),
                     group = factor(our_rip_enriched))) +
  stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#0072B2", "FALSE" = "grey40"),
    labels = group_labels2
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4,
           label = wilcox_label2, size = 3) +
  labs(
    x     = "Teleman eIF4E IP / IgG log2FC",
    y     = "Cumulative fraction",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.3, 0.85))

p_cdf2
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "03_teleman_cdf_our_normoxia_enriched.pdf"),
       p_cdf2, width = 6, height = 5)
```

```{r}

```
